docket_entries.description: SUBPOENA ISSUED TO TRACI JOHNSON, SAFECO INSURANCE COMPANY OF AMERICA 2710 GATEWAY OAKS DR. STE.150N SACRAMENTO, CA. 95833

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEI, ZHI RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DONG, YONG $10,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $195.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,195.00, THE COURT AWARDS THE JURISDICTIONAL LIMIT FOR MEDICAL BILLS, PAIN AND SUFFERING, AND PROPERTY DAMAGE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT DONG, YONG
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED APR-02-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY LEI, ZHI AS TO DEFENDANT DONG, YONG ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-07-2018 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SUBPOENA ISSUED TO AUSTIN SCHRADER, SAFECO INSURANCE COMPANY OF AMERICA ,2710 GATEWAY OAKS DR. STE.150N SACRAMENTO, CA. 95833

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-07-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-07-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ZHI LEI. DEFENDANT YOUG DONG DID NOT APPEAR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SUBPOENA ISSUED TO JESSICA BURTON, SAFECO INSURANCE CO. OF AMERICA 2710 GATEWAY OAKS DRIVE, STE 150N, SACRAMENTO CA 95833
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-04-2019 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEI, ZHI RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DONG, YONG $2,297.00 PRINCIPAL, $195.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,492.00, PLAINTIFF HAS PREVIOUSLY RELEASED ALL PROPERTY DAMAGE CLAIMS EXCEPT $297. THE COURT AWARDS $297 FOR PROPERTY DAMAGE AND $2000 FOR PERSONAL INJURIES. PLAINTIFF DID NOT PROVIDE SUFFICIENT EVIDENCE TO PROVE THE FULL AMOUNT OF HIS MEDICAL COSTS WERE REASONABLE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - (FEE FOR SERVICE: $120.00) SERVED OCT-15-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT DONG, YONG
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-07-2018 - JUDGMENT.
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT DONG, YONG HEARING SET FOR JAN-04-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY YONG DONG IS GRANTED. CONTINUED TO JAN-04-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN 506 FOR TRIAL.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-04-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-04-2019 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. PLAINTIFF ZHI ZEI IS PRESENT ASSISTED WITH MANDARIN INTERPRETER REBBECA CHAU. DEFENDANT YONG DONG IS PRESENT ASSISTED BY MANDARIN INTERPRETER KASIE CHUNG. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
